title: Prisma Adapter Test Entity
description: Scratch formation for @raindb/prisma-adapter end-to-end write tests. Safe to write/delete; not used by any application.

id.description: Primary key (scopeKey), auto-generated UUIDv7 when omitted.

count.description: An integer field for update tests.

deleted.description: Soft-delete marker set by the adapter's DELETE translation.
